page.title: Integrations
page.description: Review which integrations are available to you and configure your personal settings where needed.
page.emptyState: No integrations available. Ask your organization admin to enable integrations for your organization.
page.errorLoadingMessage: An error occurred while loading integrations.

dialog.title: User Configuration — {{name}}
dialog.description: Set your personal configuration for this integration. These values override organization defaults.
dialog.authorizationDescription: Authorize your personal account for this integration before using it in agents or skills.
dialog.nothingToConfigure: This integration does not require any personal configuration.
dialog.error: Failed to save user configuration. Please try again.
dialog.notFound: Integration not found. It may have been deleted.

oauth.errorToast: OAuth authorization failed. Please try again.
oauth.errorState: OAuth state is invalid or expired. Please start again.
oauth.errorOauthExchange: OAuth token exchange failed. Please try again.
oauth.errorClientNotConfigured: OAuth client is not configured for this integration.
